title: Duinuogwuin (language)
content:

{{Language
|image=

'''Duinuogwuin''' was the native [[Language/Legends|language]] of the [[Duinuogwuin/Legends|Star Dragons]]. It was a series of hissing sibilants and guttural growls. Most other [[Species/Legends|species]] could not reproduce the language with their vocal cords. the language had a written form.<ref name="GatORW" />

==Sources==
*<!-- 2004-03-24 -->''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]''
